source_actor: European High Performance Computing Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC JU)
occurrence_sentence: The European High Performance Computing Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC JU) has launched a call for tender for the installation of the EuroQCS-France photonic quantum computer, a new EuroHPC quantum computer to be located in France.
source_actor_key: european high performance computing joint undertaking

source_actor: European High Performance Computing Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC JU)
interaction_phrase: will be co-funded by the EuroHPC JU and France
occurrence_sentence: The total cost of the system is EUR 11.4 million and will be co-funded by the EuroHPC JU and France.

interaction_phrase: led by GENCI as hosting entity
occurrence_sentence: The EuroQCS-France consortium is led by GENCI as hosting entity and CEA as hosting site, with the University Politehnica of Bucharest (UPB, Romania), Forschungszentrum Jülich (FZJ, Germany) and Irish Centre for High- End Computing (ICHEC, Ireland) as members.

interaction_phrase: tightly integrating two quantum computers, each controlling 100-plus qubits in the Tier-0
occurrence_sentence: HPCQS is the first initiative towards a federated European quantum computing infrastructure, tightly integrating two quantum computers, each controlling 100-plus qubits in the Tier-0 HPC systems Joliot-Curie of GENCI and the JUWELS modular supercomputer at the Julich Supercomputing Centre (JSC).
